heroHeadline: Chapitos vs Mayos: Sinaloa Cartel Civil War Devastates Northwestern Mexico
heroSubtitle: 604 days of intra-cartel war following Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,400+ dead, 9,000+ families displaced, La Mayiza controls 90% of former Chapitos territory
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR
